C[pathogenix: Nice simple opening - this is called Ni-Ren-Sei. The two biggest things you can do now are a) approach one of my corners, and b) enclose your own corner.

C[pathogenix: too aggressive - you're not playing Adam now. Where can you make territory using the stones you have on the board? The top looks like Black gets to keep it all. The bottom can be invaded if you pick the right point, the important thing is to make sure you have lots of space to build in
pathogenix: Or you can try to run out into the centre
C[pathogenix: You can't kill those white stones, they are alive and strong, if you want to attack them you'll have to weaken them fist by surrounding them
pathogenix: You can't kill these stones :)
pathogenix: you have a whole board to play in
pathogenix: and the potential to make a really big framework on the top
pathogenix: unless white gets to spoil it because you're busy chasing a live group
